segments.speaker: speaker_1
segments.text: So for the matching engine, I think we should ship the tag-based pass first and add embeddings later.

segments.speaker: speaker_2
segments.text: Agreed. Let's lock the hybrid matcher as the v1 design and not block on the embedding model.

segments.speaker: speaker_1
segments.text: I'll wire VoxTerm transcripts into the pipeline by Friday so we have real data.

segments.speaker: speaker_2
segments.text: One open question is whether Conclave's graph should own speaker identity or the pipeline does.
